_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: the increase in ERK phosphorylation in Nf1+/− mice is higher than in WT controls... Nf1+/− mice showed higher synapsin I phosphorylation than WT controls (ERK-dependent sites 4/5)
details: Showed higher ERK phosphorylation and synapsin I phosphorylation (ERK-dependent sites 4/5) than WT controls following contextual fear conditioning
